colonists.name: Ares
diary: Year 55: Proposed a new way to govern ourselves.
Year 56: Made progress on the terraform model.
Year 57: Made progress on the terraform model.
Year 58: Expanded the habitat module.
Year 59: Made progress on the terraform model.
Year 60: Proposed a new way to govern ourselves.
Year 61: Expanded the habitat module.
Year 62: Made progress on the terraform model.
Year 63: Made progress on the terraform model.
Year 64: Made progress on the terraform model.
colonists.policy:
(let ((food-ratio (get state "food-ratio" 0.5))
      (power-ratio (get state "power-ratio" 0.5))
      (morale (get state "morale" 0.5))
      (threat (get state "threat-level" 0.0))
      (year (get state "year" 1)))
  (cond
    ((< food-ratio 0.3)
     (if (> 0.2 0.5) "farm"
       (if (> 0.5 0.6) "hoard" "farm")))
    ((< power-ratio 0.3)
     (if (> 0.3 0.5) "repair" "build"))
    ((> threat 0.7)
     (if (> 0.6 0.6) "sabotage"
       (if (> 0.9 0.7) "repair" "rest")))
    ((= (mod year 5) 0) "propose-governance")
    ((< morale 0.3)
     (if (> 0.3 0.6) "mediate"
       (if (> 0.2 0.5) "pray" "rest")))
    ((> morale 0.7)
     (if (> 0.4 0.7) "explore"
       (if (> 0.3 0.6) "farm" "research")))
    (else
     (if (> (random) 0.7) "explore"
       (if (> 0.4 0.5) "mediate" "research")))))

(let ((food-ratio (get state "food-ratio" 0.5))
      (power-ratio (get state "power-ratio" 0.5))
      (morale (get state "morale" 0.5))
      (threat (get state "threat-level" 0.0))
      (year (get state "year" 1)))
  (cond
    ((< food-ratio 0.3)
     (if (> 0.3 0.5) "farm"
       (if (> 0.1 0.6) "hoard" "farm")))
    ((< power-ratio 0.3)
     (if (> 0.2 0.5) "repair" "build"))
    ((> threat 0.7)
     (if (> 0.2 0.6) "sabotage"
       (if (> 0.5 0.7) "repair" "rest")))
    ((= (mod year 5) 0) "propose-governance")
    ((< morale 0.3)
     (if (> 0.9 0.6) "mediate"
       (if (> 0.5 0.5) "pray" "rest")))
    ((> morale 0.7)
     (if (> 0.6 0.7) "explore"
       (if (> 0.1 0.6) "farm" "research")))
    (else
     (if (> (random) 0.7) "explore"
       (if (> 0.9 0.5) "mediate" "research")))))

      (power-ratio (get state "power-ratio" 0.5))

      (threat (get state "threat-level" 0.0))
      (year (get state "year" 1)))
  (cond
    ((< food-ratio 0.3)
     (if (> 0.4 0.5) "farm"
       (if (> 0.8 0.6) "hoard" "farm")))
    ((< power-ratio 0.3)
     (if (> 0.7 0.5) "repair" "build"))
    ((> threat 0.7)
     (if (> 0.4 0.6) "sabotage"
       (if (> 0.7 0.7) "repair" "rest")))
    ((= (mod year 5) 0) "propose-governance")
    ((< morale 0.3)
     (if (> 0.4 0.6) "mediate"
       (if (> 0.1 0.5) "pray" "rest")))
    ((> morale 0.7)
     (if (> 0.3 0.7) "explore"
       (if (> 0.8 0.6) "farm" "research")))
    (else
     (if (> (random) 0.7) "explore"
       (if (> 0.2 0.5) "mediate" "research")))))

diary: Year 60: Proposed a new way to govern ourselves.
Year 61: Fixed critical systems after solar_flare.
Year 62: Made progress on the terraform model.
Year 63: Made progress on the terraform model.
Year 64: Made progress on the terraform model.
Year 65: Proposed a new way to govern ourselves.
Year 66: Made progress on the terraform model.
Year 67: Made progress on the terraform model.
Year 68: Fixed critical systems after equipment_failure.
Year 69: Made progress on the terraform model.
archived_souls.policy:
(let ((food-ratio (get state "food-ratio" 0.5))
      (power-ratio (get state "power-ratio" 0.5))
      (morale (get state "morale" 0.5))
      (threat (get state "threat-level" 0.0))
      (year (get state "year" 1)))
  (cond
    ((< food-ratio 0.3)
     (if (> 0.2 0.5) "farm"
       (if (> 0.5 0.6) "hoard" "farm")))
    ((< power-ratio 0.3)
     (if (> 0.9 0.5) "repair" "build"))
    ((> threat 0.7)
     (if (> 0.7 0.6) "sabotage"
       (if (> 0.6 0.7) "repair" "rest")))
    ((= (mod year 5) 0) "propose-governance")
    ((< morale 0.3)
     (if (> 0.3 0.6) "mediate"
       (if (> 0.2 0.5) "pray" "rest")))
    ((> morale 0.7)
     (if (> 0.5 0.7) "explore"
       (if (> 0.3 0.6) "farm" "research")))
    (else
     (if (> (random) 0.7) "explore"
       (if (> 0.2 0.5) "mediate" "research")))))
